gaps_union: Vendor obligation to notify Customer of law enforcement or government access requests for personal data
Vendor obligation to maintain records of processing activities and make them available to Customer
Defined subprocessor change notice and objection procedure
Customer's right to request return or deletion of personal data during the service term

Notification to Customer of government or law enforcement access requests for personal data
Notification of law enforcement or government access requests
Vendor's independent obligation to comply with applicable data protection laws
